metadata.description: Comprehensive AI skills for zero-knowledge proof security — circuits, proving systems, zkVMs, and DSL-specific auditing

plugins.name: zkvm-security
plugins.description: Audits zkVMs for soundness, witness, transcript, recursion, and verifier bugs. Covers SP1, RISC Zero, OpenVM, and similar systems.

plugins.name: zkp-circuits
plugins.description: Detects under-constrained and over-constrained circuits across ZK DSLs including Circom, halo2, Noir, and GNARK.

plugins.name: zkp-proving-systems
plugins.description: Audits ZKP proving system backends for Fiat-Shamir bugs, polynomial arithmetic issues, and cryptographic primitive misuse.

plugins.name: circom-security
plugins.description: DSL-specific security skills for Circom circuits — signal constraints, component usage, and snarkjs integration.
